case_title: MALENA REED VS. RAYMOND CHARLES BOYD JR ET AL

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF REED, MALENA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BOYD JR, RAYMOND CHARLES $445.00 PRINCIPAL, $115.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $560.00, RAMONA "MOONIE" BOYD IS DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-17-2021 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO SEP-01-2021 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF MALENA REED IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT CHARLES BOYD JR IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT RAMONA "MOONIE" BOYD IS NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFF DISMISSES HER CASE AGAINST DEFENDANT RAMONA "MOONIE" BOYD. PARTIES CAME TO A SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT IN COURT FOR A PAYMENT OF $495 TO THE PLAINTIFF IN TEN $50 PAYMENTS BY THE 15TH OF EACH MONTH. THE FIRST PAYMENT WAS TENDERED IN COURT. APPEARANCE IS REQUIRED AT THE SEPT HEARING IF NO PAYMENT IS MADE. IF NO APPEARANCES THE CASE WILL BE CONTINUED UNTIL THE BALANCE IS PAID AND SUBSEQUENTLY DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE PER SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. THE ESTIMATED RESOLVE DATE WILL BE IN FEB. 2022. CASE IS TO BE CONTINUED IN 3 MONTH INTERVALS. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. COMMISSIONER: PANG LY; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,851.00 FILED BY REED, MALENA AS TO DEFENDANT BOYD JR, RAYMOND CHARLES BOYD, RAMONA "MOONIE" ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-17-2021 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $40.00 - SERVED MAR-19-2021, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT BOYD JR, RAYMOND CHARLES
ORDER CASE CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT: PENDING SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-01-2021 - JUDGMENT. PLAINTIFF MALENA REED IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT RAYMOND CHARLES BOYD JR., ET AL IS PRESENT. COURT DISCLOSURE REGARDING CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS IS MADE. PLSINTIFF STATES THAT THE SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT HAS BROKEN DOWN AND THAT SHE HAS NOT RECEIVED ANY PAYMENTS OTHER THAN THE ONE PAYMENT OF $50.00 THAT WAS PAID IN COURT ON MAY 17, 2021. PLAINTIFF REVIEWED AND RETURNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED. (506)
